Desktop only — for now

PDF Mini Editor is currently optimised for desktop browsers. The mobile layout is being rebuilt and isn't ready yet.

Please open pdf.kamagio.com on a desktop or laptop — Chrome, Edge, Firefox or Safari all work. The full editor is free.

If you really want to peek on this device you can continue anyway, but layout will be broken until the mobile rework ships.

Or click anywhere in this area to choose a file

Quick guide

  1. Open a PDF (drop here or click)
  2. Add Text: click on the PDF and type. Enter finishes; Shift+Enter = new line. Select text to format (Bold, Italic, Underline, colour, background)
  3. Image: insert from a file or Ctrl+V paste. Drag corners to resize, top handle to rotate
  4. Draw — brushes pen · pencil · highlighter · marker. Highlighter prints identical to the screen — never darker on overlap
  5. Shapes — rectangle, ellipse, line, arrow with smart snap, alignment & equal-spacing guides (Figma-style)
  6. Form fields (F) — text · multi-line · number · date · checkbox · dropdown · combobox · multi-select · toggle · signature · action button. Per field: required *, tooltip, format (USD/EUR/CZK/% · ISO/US/EU date), Tab #
  7. Drag/double-click/Delete. Copy / cut / paste across pages with Ctrl+C / X / V
  8. Save, Export (HQ / Web / Archive / Word / Text) or Print. Zoom with Ctrl+scroll
  9. Measure & view (M / 📐 ▦) — drag to measure in mm/cm/in/px; ruler & grid in the View bar
  10. PDF metadata — click 📊 to edit Title / Author / Subject / Keywords. Command palette Ctrl+K & single-letter shortcuts
QUICK

Create New Signature

Your saved signatures — click to insert
Draw Signature*
A small audit stamp is rendered into the signature image — non-removable. Includes: SHA-256 hash of the document, timestamp from an external time server, your IP + ISP + city-level location from ipapi.co (always captured), browser/OS. Click Capture GPS below for street-level precision and an English address via OpenStreetMap. Optional signer fields make it more official. All client-side, no backend.
Signer identity (optional — printed on the stamp)
IP-based city/region is captured automatically. Click for GPS coordinates + street address.

Stamps

No custom stamps yet. Click Create New Stamp to make one.

DRAFT
Image = upload a logo or scan of a real stamp.

Click to choose a PNG / JPG / SVG…
Transparent PNGs work best for logos and round stamps.

Organize Pages

Which page to use as replacement?

Compress PDF

Compression rasterizes each page into a JPEG image at the chosen quality. Vector text becomes part of the image, but file size shrinks significantly.

🔒 Password protect

Encrypt the current PDF with a password. The output is a .pdfenc file (AES-256-GCM, 250k PBKDF2 rounds). Open it back via the Open button — drop the .pdfenc file or pick it normally.
⚠ No recovery: without the password, the file cannot be decrypted. The encryption is fully client-side — your password never leaves the browser.

🔓 Decrypt PDF

This file is encrypted. Enter the password to open it.

🧼 Sanitize document

Strip everything that could leak data: PDF metadata, hidden objects, JavaScript actions, and old incremental revisions. Annotations are baked into the visual layer first so nothing is "secretly editable" afterwards.

🛡 RegEx redact

Permanently remove sensitive data. Each match in the PDF text layer is covered by an opaque rectangle and the text is dropped from the underlying content. Save the document to bake these in.
📖 Regex cheat sheet — click to expand
Basics:
. any char · \d digit (0-9) · \w word char · \s whitespace
+ one or more · * zero or more · ? optional
{n} exactly n times · {n,m} n-to-m times
\b word boundary · ^ start · $ end
[abc] any of a/b/c · [^abc] none of a/b/c · [A-Z] any uppercase letter
(a|b) either a or b · \. literal dot (escape special chars with \)

Examples:
\b\d{4}\s\d{4}\s\d{4}\s\d{4}\b — credit card with spaces
(?:Mr|Mrs|Dr)\.\s\w+ — titles followed by a name
\b[A-Z][a-z]+\s[A-Z][a-z]+\b — Two capitalised words (a name)

⇄ Compare two PDFs

Both PDFs are rendered side by side. Red = removed in the original, green = added in the updated version. Unchanged text stays untouched.

Fill form from JSON

Paste a JSON object and we'll match its keys to the PDF's form-field names (case-insensitive, substring match). Or paste an array to produce multiple filled copies as a ZIP.

Split PDF

Split the current PDF into multiple files. Each chunk downloads as its own PDF.
Each range becomes one output PDF. Use commas to separate; dashes for inclusive ranges.
e.g. 2 → produces files of pages 1-2, 3-4, 5-6, …

🔐 Sign PDF with X.509 certificate

Real PAdES-B-B signature embedded in the PDF. Acrobat Reader will display the signature widget and validate the certificate chain against installed trust roots.

Share PDF by email

PDF is compressed locally, then opens the system Share dialog (mobile + Chrome/Edge on Windows) → pick an email app and the file is already attached. If your browser doesn't support Web Share with files (Firefox, Safari on desktop), it falls back to download + mailto (drag-and-drop). Browser security blocks automatic mailto attachments.
Pick a compression level and click Share.

AI Result

Loading…
🤖 Ask AI about this PDF
Ask a question about the open PDF and I'll answer using its contents. The viewer will jump to the page the answer came from.

Settings

Application language
Pick the interface language. The default is auto-detected from your browser; your choice is saved on this device.
Language switches instantly — no reload needed.
Interface complexity
Simple hides advanced/Pro tools (RegEx redact, JSON fill, table extract, sanitize, password, AI…). Pro shows everything. Switch any time — your annotations are unaffected.
Tip: even in Simple mode, every tool is still reachable via Ctrl+K (command search).
Keyboard shortcuts
Ctrl+K or / — search any action · V Select · T Text · D Draw · E Edit PDF text · H Highlight · U Underline · R Shape · ? Help · Esc Cancel
Automatic local backup
Your profile, signatures, custom stamps, templates, and preferences are automatically snapshotted to your browser's IndexedDB. The snapshot survives page reloads — and is offered for restore after a new version of the app is installed if your localStorage was wiped.
Checking last backup…
Export / Import as file
Move your settings between devices, or keep an off-device backup. The exported JSON contains profile, signatures, stamps, templates, AI config, and UI preferences. No PDFs are included.
Reset
Wipe local data (profile, signatures, custom stamps, templates, recent colours, AI config). PDFs in the auto-save draft are not affected.
Local AI server (OpenAI-compatible)
Point this to a local LLM that exposes an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint — Ollama, llama.cpp server, LM Studio, vLLM, etc. When connected, AI features (Summarize PDF, Translate, Explain paragraph, Fill-in suggestions) appear in the toolbar. Leave blank to disable.
Not configured.
Privacy
Requests are sent directly from your browser to the URL you configured. Nothing is sent to Anthropic, OpenAI, or any third party by this app. For LAN servers, ensure CORS is enabled on your AI host (most LLM servers expose this via a config flag).
Local error log
JavaScript errors are captured to this log so you can attach them to a bug report. Logs never leave your device unless you copy or email them yourself.
No errors logged.
Report a problem / send feedback
Compose a bug report or feedback message. It opens in your default mail client (mailto:) with the error log attached — or you can copy the body to the clipboard.
Note: SMTP from a browser requires a server bridge. The mail-client option works on every device without any backend. If you want fully automatic SMTP delivery, add a small relay (e.g., a Cloudflare Worker or a small Node server) and we'll wire it in here.

Welcome to PDF Mini Editor

Step 1 of 1

Page Setup PRO

Add headers, footers, page numbers, or a watermark to multiple pages at once.
Header
Footer
Page Numbers
Use {n} for the current page and {total} for the total count.
Text Watermark

Add hyperlink

Templates PRO

Templates save a snapshot of the current annotations (text, stamps, shapes, signatures, layout) so you can apply them to any other PDF later. Add your edits to this PDF, type a name, click ＋ Save current — then open a different PDF and click the template to drop the same content on top.
No templates yet. Add annotations to your PDF, then click ＋ Save current.

Bookmarks / Outline PRO

No bookmarks yet.
Bookmarks are written to the PDF outline on Save. Existing outlines from the original file are preserved.

📄 New blank PDF

Creates a single blank page at the size you pick. You can add more pages later via Pages → + Blank page.

Crop / Resize / Margins PRO

Tip: pre-rotation happens before fit math, so a 90° rotate of a portrait scan will fit a landscape target without distortion.
Annotations are baked in before resizing. PDF reloads with the new dimensions.

Export PDF PRO
